mv_dashboard_agent_stats.name: mv_dashboard_agent_stats
mv_dashboard_agent_stats.definition:
SELECT agent_version,
    count(*) AS num_machines
   FROM assets
  WHERE ((is_active = true) AND (agent_version IS NOT NULL))
  GROUP BY agent_version
  ORDER BY (count(*)) DESC;

mv_dashboard_most_updated.name: mv_dashboard_most_updated
mv_dashboard_most_updated.definition:
SELECT ti.package,
    count(*) AS total_updates,
    count(DISTINCT t.hostname) AS distinct_hosts_updated
   FROM ((transaction_items ti
     JOIN transactions t ON (((ti.transaction_id = t.transaction_id) AND (ti.machine_id = t.machine_id))))
     JOIN assets a ON (((t.machine_id = a.machine_id) AND (t.hostname = a.hostname))))
  WHERE ((ti.action = 'Upgrade'::text) AND (t.end_time >= (now() - '30 days'::interval)) AND (a.is_active = true))
  GROUP BY ti.package
  ORDER BY (count(*)) DESC
 LIMIT 10;

mv_dashboard_os_stats.name: mv_dashboard_os_stats
mv_dashboard_os_stats.definition:
SELECT os,
    count(*) AS num_machines
   FROM assets
  WHERE ((is_active = true) AND (os IS NOT NULL))
  GROUP BY os
  ORDER BY (count(*)) DESC;

mv_package_listing.name: mv_package_listing
mv_package_listing.definition:
WITH distinctpackages AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT
                CASE
                    WHEN (transaction_items.package ~~ 'Change %'::text) THEN SUBSTRING(transaction_items.package FROM 8)
                    ELSE transaction_items.package
                END AS clean_package
           FROM transaction_items
        ), latestversions AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON (
                CASE
                    WHEN (transaction_items.package ~~ 'Change %'::text) THEN SUBSTRING(transaction_items.package FROM 8)
                    ELSE transaction_items.package
                END)
                CASE
                    WHEN (transaction_items.package ~~ 'Change %'::text) THEN SUBSTRING(transaction_items.package FROM 8)
                    ELSE transaction_items.package
                END AS package,
            transaction_items.version,
            transaction_items.release,
            transaction_items.arch,
            transaction_items.repo
           FROM transaction_items
          ORDER BY
                CASE
                    WHEN (transaction_items.package ~~ 'Change %'::text) THEN SUBSTRING(transaction_items.package FROM 8)
                    ELSE transaction_items.package
                END, transaction_items.version DESC, transaction_items.release DESC
        ), versioncounts AS (
         SELECT
                CASE
                    WHEN (transaction_items.package ~~ 'Change %'::text) THEN SUBSTRING(transaction_items.package FROM 8)
                    ELSE transaction_items.package
                END AS package,
            count(DISTINCT ROW(transaction_items.version, transaction_items.release)) AS total_versions
           FROM transaction_items
          GROUP BY
                CASE
                    WHEN (transaction_items.package ~~ 'Change %'::text) THEN SUBSTRING(transaction_items.package FROM 8)
                    ELSE transaction_items.package
                END
        ), machinecounts AS (
         SELECT
                CASE
                    WHEN (ti.package ~~ 'Change %'::text) THEN SUBSTRING(ti.package FROM 8)
                    ELSE ti.package
                END AS package,
            count(DISTINCT ti.machine_id) AS machine_count
           FROM (transaction_items ti
             JOIN assets a ON ((ti.machine_id = a.machine_id)))
          WHERE (a.is_active = true)
          GROUP BY
                CASE
                    WHEN (ti.package ~~ 'Change %'::text) THEN SUBSTRING(ti.package FROM 8)
                    ELSE ti.package
                END
        )
 SELECT lv.package,
    lv.version,
    lv.release,
    lv.arch,
    lv.repo,
    (COALESCE(vc.total_versions, (1)::bigint) - 1) AS other_versions_count,
    COALESCE(mc.machine_count, (0)::bigint) AS machine_count
   FROM ((latestversions lv
     LEFT JOIN versioncounts vc ON ((lv.package = vc.package)))
     LEFT JOIN machinecounts mc ON ((lv.package = mc.package)))
  ORDER BY lv.package;
